slots: Start early to beat heat — buy a torch for the dark zigzag passage. Climb through successive gates to the summit citadel.
A 30-minute drive brings you to Ellora’s Cave 16 — dedicate the afternoon to the Kailasa complex alone.
Stay in the city for day two at Ajanta or more Ellora caves.
Explore caves 1–12 and the Jain complex on the far end — less crowded in morning.
Short drive to one of the twelve Jyotirlinga shrines — dress modestly.
Aurangabad’s Muslim-Deccan food rewards a long heritage day.
Drive to Ajanta for the painted caves — the ultimate Deccan trilogy: Daulatabad, Ellora, Ajanta.
Finish with the classic ravine viewpoint outside the cave horseshoe.
Three days covers Maharashtra’s greatest Deccan icons in one loop.
